=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 3.19.19

/.src/redundantOrDie_preview.ts(9,35): warning TS377096: This generator applies `Effect.orDie` to every yielded effect. Hoist it once to the generator result: `Effect.gen(...).pipe(Effect.orDie)`, or `Effect.fn(function*(){ ... }, Effect.orDie)`. effect(redundantOrDie)


==== /.src/redundantOrDie_preview.ts (1 errors) ====
    // @effect-v3
    // @effect-diagnostics *:off
    // @effect-diagnostics redundantOrDie:warning
    import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
    
    declare const first: Effect.Effect<number, unknown>
    declare const second: Effect.Effect<string, unknown>
    
    export const program = Effect.gen(function*() {
                                      ~~~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377096: This generator applies `Effect.orDie` to every yielded effect. Hoist it once to the generator result: `Effect.gen(...).pipe(Effect.orDie)`, or `Effect.fn(function*(){ ... }, Effect.orDie)`. effect(redundantOrDie)
!!! related TS377097 /.src/redundantOrDie_preview.ts(10,21): This repeated `Effect.orDie` site participates in the hoistable generator-wide `orDie`. effect(redundantOrDie)
!!! related TS377097 /.src/redundantOrDie_preview.ts(12,29): This repeated `Effect.orDie` site participates in the hoistable generator-wide `orDie`. effect(redundantOrDie)
      yield* first.pipe(Effect.orDie)
    
      return yield* second.pipe(Effect.orDie)
    })
